title: MBLEx D3 Pathology, Contraindications & Special Populations v1

questions.prompt: A client has pitting edema in both ankles. What is the most appropriate response?

choices.A: Avoid vigorous work; consider referral and screen for underlying causes.
choices.B: Proceed normally because massage lowers blood pressure.
choices.C: Recommend changing medications and continue.
choices.D: Ignore dizziness if it resolves after a few seconds.

questions.answer: Avoid vigorous work; consider referral and screen for underlying causes.
questions.why: This choice prioritizes client safety and appropriate screening or referral when risk is present.
questions.trap: Recommend changing medications and continue. sounds helpful, but it ignores contraindications, scope, or safety risk.
